name: Citation cards

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to present RAG retrieval results or supporting evidence as verifiable source cards, especially for research summaries, technical explanations, delivery reports, and development evidence; use inline text citations when you only need footnote numbers, and use a table or bibliography when showing dozens of sortable references.
en.why_valuable: Bare URLs and footnote lists are hard to scan and easily omit authors, dates, and evidence snippets; this template combines a local icon/domain, title, author and date, snippet, and [n] citation number into compact source cards without requesting remote favicons.

data_in.note: data.citations is an array of source records rendered in the given order. ref may be a number from the answer or a custom identifier; favicon is a local glyph/emoji of at most two characters, does not accept or load image URLs, and defaults to the domain's first letter. url creates an openable title link only for http/https; boot itself does not fetch.

schema.title?: string -- card-group title; displays "Sources" when omitted
schema.citations: {ref:string|number,title:string,domain:string,favicon?:string,url?:string,author?:string,date?:string,snippet?:string}[] -- source records; favicon is a local character, url is an optional http(s) target, author/date form the byline, and snippet is a short excerpt supporting the conclusion

spec.note: Height grows automatically with the source count and snippet length; the card grid has a minimum column width of 280px and becomes one column below 520px. No vh/percentage height or network resource loading.

when_to_use: 需要把 RAG 检索结果或回答依据呈现为可核验的来源卡片时用它，适合研究摘要、技术说明、交付报告和开发证据；若只需行内脚注编号应用文本引用，若要展示数十条可排序文献则用表格或文献列表。
why_valuable: 裸 URL 和脚注列表很难扫读，也容易漏掉作者、日期与证据片段；本模板把本地图标/域名、标题、作者日期、snippet 和 [n] 引用号统一为紧凑来源卡，且不会请求远程 favicon。

data_in.note: data.citations 是来源记录数组，按给定顺序渲染。ref 可用回答中的数字或自定义编号；favicon 是最多显示两个字符的本地 glyph/emoji，不接受并不会加载图片 URL，省略时从 domain 首字母生成。url 仅在 http/https 协议时生成可打开标题链接；boot 本身不 fetch。

schema.title?: string —— 卡片组标题；省略时显示 “Sources”
schema.citations: {ref:string|number,title:string,domain:string,favicon?:string,url?:string,author?:string,date?:string,snippet?:string}[] —— 来源记录；favicon 为本地字符，url 为可选 http(s) 目标，author/date 组成署名行，snippet 为支持结论的短摘述

spec.note: 按来源数量和 snippet 长度自动增高；卡片网格最小列宽 280px，520px 以下单列。无 vh/百分比高度，无网络资源加载。

example._why: 四个熟悉的官方/学术来源含 glyph、域名、作者日期、链接和证据摘要，可验证完整 RAG 卡片结构及 [n] 对应关系。

citations.title: Using custom elements
citations.author: MDN Web Docs
citations.snippet: Defines the lifecycle and registration model for reusable custom elements.

citations.title: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2
citations.author: W3C
citations.snippet: Provides the normative accessibility success criteria referenced in the evaluation.

citations.title: Progress indicators make a slow system less insufferable
citations.author: Chris Harrison
citations.snippet: Explains why visible progress reduces uncertainty during longer operations.

citations.title: open-visualize source repository
citations.author: Project maintainers
citations.snippet: Primary implementation reference used to verify component packaging conventions.

uplink: 纯 display 组件，无 uplink；所有状态均由 data 决定，不向 AI 或宿主回传选择。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
